risk_description: Pilot showed an 8% selection-rate gap between male and female candidates for engineering roles. Without ongoing mitigation the model may systematically rank female candidates lower.
controls_in_place: Quarterly bias/fairness tests (Fairlearn); fairness-aware retraining trigger when subgroup AUC gap exceeds 5%; exclude photo + DOB from features

risk_title: Vendor may retrain on customer data
risk_description: Vendor TalentRank.ai default terms allowed training on tenant data. Contract had no model-change notice clause and no exit/escrow provisions.
controls_in_place: Signed AI addendum (no-train-on-customer-data, 90-day data return, model-weight escrow, audit rights, model-change notification)

risk_description: Candidates are not informed their CV is scored by AI. Breach of EU AI Act Art. 13 and GDPR Art. 13/22 right to information and human-review.
controls_in_place: Updated careers portal privacy notice; AI disclosure banner; GDPR Art. 22 human-review request route; recruiter UI shows top-5 features per score

risk_description: Candidate data from UAE flows to AWS Bahrain (vendor tenancy) and US-based vendor support. UAE PDPL Art. 22 cross-border transfer needs lawful basis.
controls_in_place: Standard Contractual Clauses; UAE Data Office adequacy assessment; data minimisation; UAE-resident processing for special-category data

risk_description: If recruiters defer to AI ranking without independent judgement human oversight becomes nominal and EU AI Act Art. 14 is breached.
controls_in_place: Recruiter training; monthly override-rate KPI with 10% floor; ARC escalation if breached two periods in a row

risk_description: LLM may produce confident but incorrect product specs causing customer harm and complaint volume.
controls_in_place: RAG grounding to product catalogue; output filter; weekly 200-question gold-set evaluation; threshold 95% pass-rate
notes: One incident in Q1 2026; mitigations in production. Linked treatments: T-0007;T-0008
